internalNotes: Standard monthly tiers shared with 96 mg and 128 mg monthly formulations

idealSteps: The injection is not yet overdue (less than 3 weeks since last administration). Please consult the early administration guidance.
Administer the next injection, regardless of the level of unregulated opioid use.
If the patient reports active use of unregulated opioids, discuss a switch to a higher dose of LAI-buprenorphine and consult prescriber if the patient is interested.*
Conduct a fentanyl dependence assessment before administering:
Administer next injection if the client has **“minimal/no fentanyl dependence”, see definition below**, or if the client has taken at least 8 mg of sublingual buprenorphine in the last 24 hours.
Administer if they have “moderate fentanyl dependence” and are ok with the risk of some bup-induced withdrawal.
If the patient reports active use of unregulated opioids, discuss a switch to a higher dose of LAI-buprenorphine and consult prescriber if the patient is interested.*
providerNotifications: Consult prescriber if patient does not meet minimal/no, or moderate fentanyl dependence criteria.

idealSteps: Conduct a fentanyl dependence assessment before administering:
Administer next injection if the client has **“minimal/no fentanyl dependence”, see definition below**, or if the client has taken at least 8 mg of sublingual buprenorphine in the last 24 hours.
If the patient reports active use of unregulated opioids, discuss a switch to a higher dose of LAI-buprenorphine and consult prescriber if the patient is interested.*
providerNotifications: Consult prescriber if patient does not meet minimal/no fentanyl dependence criteria.

idealSteps: **Consult a prescriber in real-time** before administering. The goal is to avoid having the patient leave without guidance. You may consult the ORCA Center providers, ORCA Senior Medical Lead or DESC medical director.

internalNotes: Weekly injections (24 mg or 32 mg): 9-day window, then prescriber guidance required

idealSteps: The weekly Brixadi injection is not yet due. Please consult the early administration guidance.
Administer the weekly Brixadi injection. Missed weekly doses (24 mg or 32 mg) may be given up to **9 days** after the last injection per the standing order.
The weekly Brixadi injection is more than 9 days overdue.
providerNotifications: Contact prescriber for guidance before administering.

requiredFields.message: Please enter the date of last Brixadi injection.
